pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: 'You must create two custom bridge networks named 'frontend' and 'backend''
Task description specifies 'web-proxy' (image: nginx:alpine). Setup script pulls 'nginx:alpine' via 'docker pull nginx:alpine'
Task description: 'web-proxy' (image: nginx:alpine) connected ONLY to the 'frontend' network

Task description: 'ensure web-proxy cannot directly communicate with data-store (no shared network)'. Forbidding both 'backend' (to isolate from data-store) and 'bridge' (to isolate from default Docker network) is correct
Task description specifies 'app-server' (image: httpd:alpine). Setup script pulls 'httpd:alpine' via 'docker pull httpd:alpine'
Task description: 'app-server' (image: httpd:alpine) connected to BOTH 'frontend' and 'backend' networks
App-server should be on custom bridge networks only, not the default bridge network
Task description specifies 'data-store' (image: redis:alpine). Setup script pulls 'redis:alpine' via 'docker pull redis:alpine'
Task description: 'data-store' (image: redis:alpine) connected ONLY to the 'backend' network

Task description: 'ensure web-proxy cannot directly communicate with data-store (no shared network)'. Data-store should not be on frontend (to isolate from web-proxy) or bridge (to isolate from default network)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves Docker network isolation with three verified network configuration claims: two custom bridge networks named 'frontend' and 'backend', three containers (web-proxy, app-server, data-store) with specific network assignments. Verified facts: Networks exist and are named 'frontend' and 'backend' (bridge type expected). Container web-proxy must be on frontend only, app-server on both frontend and backend, and data-store on backend only. Three image name claims are incomplete in metadata: they specify 'nginx', 'httpd', and 'redis' without the ':alpine' tag, while the task description and setup script explicitly reference 'nginx:alpine', 'httpd:alpine', and 'redis:alpine'. All network isolation requirements and forbidden network constraints are correctly specified.
